articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.
articles.title: Iran warns against complying with US blockade as Gulf attacks reported

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The best shows and stars of the past 12 months are honoured at the Bafta TV Awards ceremony in London.
articles.title: Adolescence makes history at Bafta TV Awards

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Some resorts enforce allocation rules from check-in to prevent people reserving loungers with towels in the "sunbed wars".
articles.title: How hotels are stopping the 'dawn dash' for sunbeds after man wins payout

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The embattled PM will seek to persuade his MPs not to ditch him as Labour leader in a speech on Monday.
articles.title: Starmer to promise bolder action as leadership threats mount

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: British nationals who were aboard the HV Hondius will now be sent to a Merseyside hospital to quarantine for 72 hours.
articles.title: Plane carrying virus-stricken cruise ship passengers lands in UK

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.
articles.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: In recent months, there have been a string of attacks at synagogues and other Jewish sites.
articles.title: Thousands gather for protest against antisemitism in London

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: An apparently minor injury led to Jayme Stephen having a leg amputed as a result of her diabetes.
articles.title: 'I stood on a dog biscuit - it left me in a wheelchair'

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The family of Derek Poole say he loved cars and used to be a grass track racer. An investigation is under way.
articles.title: 'True gentleman', 91, killed in Selston garage bungalow explosion

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Two men, aged 58 and 26, and a 53-year-old woman were left with minor injuries from the attack.
articles.title: Man charged as three Jewish people assaulted in Enfield
